name: part_007
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_007.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal interacts with a dealer-like figure in a gambling-themed room.
Transition scene with roulette wheels and numbered tiles.
Musical performance featuring Aki Rosenthal, IRyS, Calli, Lui, and Chloe.
Musical performance featuring Aki Rosenthal, IRyS, Calli, Lui, and Chloe.

subtitles.original: はっ
subtitles.english: Hah.

subtitles.original: このコインは…
subtitles.english: This coin is...

subtitles.original: なあ、そうか。
subtitles.english: Ah, I see.

subtitles.original: 君はそっちなんだね。
subtitles.english: So you're on that side.

subtitles.original: そっち？
subtitles.english: That side?

subtitles.original: ここに座って。
subtitles.english: Sit here.

subtitles.original: えっ。
subtitles.english: Eh.

subtitles.original: この後は、君次第だよ。
subtitles.english: After this, it's up to you.

subtitles.original:
Whisper Whisper Whisper
作詞・作曲：Azari
subtitles.english:
Whisper Whisper Whisper
Lyrics/Music: Azari

subtitles.original: 忘れられないのは この目のせい
subtitles.english: I can't forget it, because of these eyes

subtitles.original: 赤く残る過ち 甘噛みの跡
subtitles.english: The red mistakes remain, like love bites

subtitles.original: 溢れ出した愛は 止めどない
subtitles.english: The overflowing love won't stop

subtitles.original: 誰もいない間に 悪魔を捜す
subtitles.english: I search for the devil while nobody's looking

subtitles.original: 作り笑いはこの耳のせい
subtitles.english: The fake smile is because of these ears

subtitles.original: 深い壁の中から 呼びかける声
subtitles.english: A voice calling out from within the deep walls

subtitles.original: Whisper Whisper Whisper まだ触らせない
subtitles.english: Whisper Whisper Whisper, I won't let you touch me yet

subtitles.original: この檻を抜け出して 悪魔は駆ける
subtitles.english: Escaping this cage, the devil runs

subtitles.original: 鏡の前でこの口のせい
subtitles.english: In front of the mirror, because of this mouth

subtitles.original: 伝えたい言葉さえ 噛み殺す夜
subtitles.english: A night where I bite back the words I want to say

subtitles.original: Whisper Whisper Whisper まだ打ち明けない
subtitles.english: Whisper Whisper Whisper, I won't reveal it yet

subtitles.original: 神様を裏切って 悪魔と過ごす
subtitles.english: Betraying God, I spend my time with the devil

subtitles.original: あいまいみー 夢見てたい あなたに
subtitles.english: I-My-Me, I want to keep dreaming for you

subtitles.original: そっと気付かせて あげたいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to make you quietly realize

subtitles.original: おお あなたにも
subtitles.english: Oh, for you too

subtitles.original: おお あなたにも
subtitles.english: Oh, for you too

subtitles.original: おお あなたにも
subtitles.english: Oh, for you too

subtitles.original: 消えまい 傷を隠したい あなたに
subtitles.english: I won't fade away, I want to hide my wounds from you

subtitles.original: そっと悩ませて あげたいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to make you quietly worry

subtitles.original: おお あなたにも
subtitles.english: Oh, for you too

subtitles.original: おお あなたにも
subtitles.english: Oh, for you too

subtitles.original: おお 悪魔を捜す
subtitles.english: Oh, searching for the devil

subtitles.original: 作り笑いはこの耳のせい
subtitles.english: The fake smile is because of these ears

subtitles.original: 深い壁の中から 呼びかける声
subtitles.english: A voice calling out from within the deep walls

subtitles.original: Whisper Whisper Whisper まだ触らせない
subtitles.english: Whisper Whisper Whisper, I won't let you touch me yet

subtitles.original: この檻を抜け出して 悪魔は駆ける
subtitles.english: Escaping this cage, the devil runs

subtitles.original: 鏡の前でこの口のせい
subtitles.english: In front of the mirror, because of this mouth

subtitles.original: 伝えたい言葉さえ 噛み殺す夜
subtitles.english: A night where I bite back the words I want to say

subtitles.original: Whisper Whisper Whisper まだ打ち明けない
subtitles.english: Whisper Whisper Whisper, I won't reveal it yet

subtitles.original: 神様を裏切って 悪魔と過ごす
subtitles.english: Betraying God, I spend my time with the devil

subtitles.original:
BANG!!!
作詞：ryo (supercell) / 作曲：Giga
subtitles.english:
BANG!!!
Lyrics: ryo (supercell) / Music: Giga

subtitles.original: 好き 嫌い 常識 I don't care! 吹っ飛ばせ BANG!!!
subtitles.english: Like, dislike, common sense, I don't care! Blow it all away, BANG!!!

subtitles.original: 多数決 マジョリティ あたしに負けはなし
subtitles.english: Majority vote, majority, no defeat for me

subtitles.original: ここまでって引かれた そのボーダー誰のルール？
subtitles.english: The border drawn "this far," whose rule is that?

subtitles.original: あの日乗り越えたウィークポイント
subtitles.english: The weak point I overcame that day

subtitles.original: 強くなったあたしが 笑い飛ばしてあげる
subtitles.english: I've grown stronger, I'll laugh it off for you

subtitles.original: 言いたいことは言う
subtitles.english: I'll say what I want to say

subtitles.original: やりたくないことはしない
subtitles.english: I won't do what I don't want to do

subtitles.original: 悪意気にしない
subtitles.english: I don't care about malice

subtitles.original: みんな違うの当然だし
subtitles.english: It's natural for everyone to be different

subtitles.original: あたしも変わらない 目の前の自分
subtitles.english: I won't change either, the person right here in front of me

subtitles.original: Everybody say, "I want to be free!"
subtitles.english: Everybody say, "I want to be free!"

subtitles.original: 本音も何も言わないんじゃ それじゃ何も変えられない
subtitles.english: If you don't speak your mind, nothing will ever change

subtitles.original: Everybody say, "I want to be more!"
subtitles.english: Everybody say, "I want to be more!"

subtitles.original: 我儘な自分 肯定
subtitles.english: Affirming my selfish self

subtitles.original: 生きてるんだ あたし
subtitles.english: I am living my life

subtitles.original: ねぇ 生きてるんだ あたし
subtitles.english: Hey, I am living my life

subtitles.original: Wow wow wow 生きてるんだ あたし
subtitles.english: Wow wow wow, I am living my life

subtitles.original: 今宵 生まれたその時から 選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: I've been choosing since the moment I was born tonight

subtitles.original: 思い出せ あたしはあたしだ
subtitles.english: Remember, I am who I am

subtitles.original: 不確かなことなんて 何ひとつない 嘘じゃない
subtitles.english: There's nothing uncertain, and that's no lie

subtitles.original: 生きたい自分に
subtitles.english: Into the person I want to be

subtitles.original: 好き 嫌い 常識 I don't care! 吹っ飛ばせ BANG!!!
subtitles.english: Like, dislike, common sense, I don't care! Blow it all away, BANG!!!

subtitles.original: 好き 嫌い 常識 I don't care! 吹っ飛ばせ BANG!!!
subtitles.english: Like, dislike, common sense, I don't care! Blow it all away, BANG!!!

subtitles.original: 狂ってんならさ 手にこのリリック勝負
subtitles.english: If you're crazy, let's settle it with these lyrics

subtitles.original: わからす 挑発 下向いた 舌打ちからの咆哮
subtitles.english: I'll make you understand, a provocation, a click of the tongue, then a roar

subtitles.original: Excuse me!
subtitles.english: Excuse me!
